reviews.comment:
El mercado es muy pequeño,no tiene variedad ni lugar para quedarse a tomar algo.
Sin embargo tienen un espacio verde arreglado, limpio y con una plaza de juegos para niños/as , parrillas y mesitas.

(Translated by Google)
The market is very small, with little variety and no place to linger for a drink.

However, they do have a well-maintained, clean green space with a children's playground, grills, and picnic tables.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTNGRqTWVnEAE
